hooks.command: file_path=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty') && case "$file_path" in *.proto) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && buf lint && buf generate ;; *go.mod) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && go mod tidy ;; esac

cmd=$(cat - | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && buf lint ;; *'gh pr create'*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && gofmt -s -w . && test -z \"$(git diff --name-only)\" && buf lint && ginkgo run -r internal ;; esac
